# mina-sdk — Complete API Reference

> Rust SDK for interacting with Mina Protocol blockchain nodes via GraphQL

Mina Protocol is a lightweight blockchain (~22 KB) powered by recursive zero-knowledge proofs (zk-SNARKs). This crate provides a typed, async Rust client for the Mina daemon's GraphQL API.

## Installation

```toml
[dependencies]
mina-sdk = "0.1"
tokio = { version = "1", features = ["rt-multi-thread", "macros"] }
```

The SDK depends on: reqwest (HTTP), serde/serde_json (serialization), tokio (async runtime), thiserror (errors), tracing (instrumentation).

---

## MinaClient

The main client struct. Holds an HTTP client with retry logic and timeout configuration.

### Construction

```rust
use mina_sdk::{MinaClient, ClientConfig};
use std::time::Duration;

// Default config (localhost:3085, 3 retries, 5s delay, 30s timeout)
let client = MinaClient::new("http://127.0.0.1:3085/graphql");

// Custom config
let client = MinaClient::with_config(ClientConfig {
    graphql_uri: "http://my-node:3085/graphql".to_string(),
    retries: 5,
    retry_delay: Duration::from_secs(10),
    timeout: Duration::from_secs(60),
});

// Access the configured URI
assert_eq!(client.graphql_uri(), "http://127.0.0.1:3085/graphql");
```

### Query Methods

All methods are async and return `mina_sdk::Result<T>`.

#### get_sync_status() → SyncStatus

```rust
let status = client.get_sync_status().await?;
// Returns SyncStatus enum: Synced, Bootstrap, Catchup, Connecting, Listening, Offline
println!("Node is {status}"); // Display impl prints "SYNCED", "BOOTSTRAP", etc.
```

#### get_daemon_status() → DaemonStatus

```rust
let status = client.get_daemon_status().await?;
// DaemonStatus fields:
//   sync_status: SyncStatus
//   blockchain_length: Option<i64>
//   highest_block_length_received: Option<i64>
//   uptime_secs: Option<i64>
//   state_hash: Option<String>
//   commit_id: Option<String>
//   peers: Option<Vec<PeerInfo>>
```

#### get_network_id() → String

```rust
let network_id = client.get_network_id().await?;
// e.g., "mainnet" or "testnet"
```

#### get_account(public_key, token_id) → AccountData

```rust
// Default token (MINA)
let account = client.get_account("B62q...", None).await?;

// Custom token
let account = client.get_account("B62q...", Some("wSHV2S4...")).await?;

// AccountData fields:
//   public_key: String
//   nonce: u64
//   balance: AccountBalance { total: Currency, liquid: Option<Currency>, locked: Option<Currency> }
//   delegate: Option<String>
//   token_id: Option<String>

// Returns Error::AccountNotFound if the account doesn't exist
```

#### get_best_chain(max_length) → Vec<BlockInfo>

```rust
let blocks = client.get_best_chain(Some(10)).await?;
// Pass None for daemon default length

// BlockInfo fields:
//   state_hash: String
//   height: u64
//   global_slot_since_hard_fork: u64
//   global_slot_since_genesis: u64
//   creator_pk: String
//   command_transaction_count: i64
```

#### get_peers() → Vec<PeerInfo>

```rust
let peers = client.get_peers().await?;
// PeerInfo fields: peer_id: String, host: String, port: i64
```

#### get_pooled_user_commands(public_key) → Vec<PooledUserCommand>

```rust
// All pending commands
let commands = client.get_pooled_user_commands(None).await?;

// For a specific sender
let commands = client.get_pooled_user_commands(Some("B62q...")).await?;

// PooledUserCommand fields: id, hash, kind, nonce, amount, fee, from, to (all String)
```

### Mutation Methods

#### send_payment(sender, receiver, amount, fee, memo, nonce) → SendPaymentResult

Requires the sender's account to be unlocked on the node.

```rust
use mina_sdk::Currency;

let result = client.send_payment(
    "B62q..sender..",
    "B62q..receiver..",
    Currency::from_mina("1.5")?,
    Currency::from_mina("0.01")?,
    Some("memo text"),      // optional memo
    None,                    // optional nonce (auto if None)
).await?;

// SendPaymentResult fields: id: String, hash: String, nonce: u64
```

#### send_delegation(sender, delegate_to, fee, memo, nonce) → SendDelegationResult

```rust
let result = client.send_delegation(
    "B62q..delegator..",
    "B62q..validator..",
    Currency::from_mina("0.01")?,
    Some("staking"),
    None,
).await?;

// SendDelegationResult fields: id: String, hash: String, nonce: u64
```

#### set_snark_worker(public_key) → Option<String>

```rust
// Enable SNARK worker
let prev = client.set_snark_worker(Some("B62q...")).await?;

// Disable SNARK worker
let prev = client.set_snark_worker(None).await?;
// Returns the previous SNARK worker key, if any
```

#### set_snark_work_fee(fee) → String

```rust
let last_fee = client.set_snark_work_fee(Currency::from_mina("0.001")?).await?;
```

### Custom Queries

```rust
use serde_json::json;

let data = client.execute_query(
    r#"query { version }"#,
    None,           // or Some(json!({ "var": "value" }))
    "get_version",  // query name for logging/errors
).await?;
// Returns serde_json::Value (the "data" field from the GraphQL response)
```

Built-in query strings are available in the `queries` module:

```rust
use mina_sdk::queries;
// queries::SYNC_STATUS, queries::DAEMON_STATUS, queries::NETWORK_ID,
// queries::GET_ACCOUNT, queries::GET_ACCOUNT_WITH_TOKEN, queries::BEST_CHAIN,
// queries::GET_PEERS, queries::POOLED_USER_COMMANDS, queries::SEND_PAYMENT,
// queries::SEND_DELEGATION, queries::SET_SNARK_WORKER, queries::SET_SNARK_WORK_FEE
```

---

## Currency

Represents a MINA amount stored as nanomina (1 MINA = 1,000,000,000 nanomina).

Implements: Debug, Clone, Copy, PartialEq, Eq, PartialOrd, Ord, Hash, Display, Add, Sub, Mul<u64>.

### Construction

```rust
use mina_sdk::Currency;

let a = Currency::from_mina("1.5")?;              // decimal string → Result<Currency>
let b = Currency::from_nanomina(1_500_000_000);    // atomic units → Currency (infallible)
let c = Currency::from_graphql("1500000000")?;     // nanomina string → Result<Currency>
assert_eq!(a, b);
assert_eq!(b, c);
```

### Conversion

```rust
let c = Currency::from_mina("42.5")?;
c.mina()           // → "42.500000000" (String, 9 decimal places)
c.nanomina()       // → 42_500_000_000 (u64)
c.to_nanomina_str() // → "42500000000" (String, for GraphQL input)
format!("{c}")      // → "42.500000000" (Display impl)
```

### Arithmetic

```rust
let a = Currency::from_mina("10.0")?;
let b = Currency::from_mina("3.0")?;

a + b              // 13.0 MINA (panics on overflow)
a - b              // 7.0 MINA (panics on underflow)
a * 3_u64          // 30.0 MINA
3_u64 * a          // 30.0 MINA

// Safe variants
a.checked_add(b)   // → Option<Currency> (None on overflow)
a.checked_sub(b)   // → Result<Currency> (Err(CurrencyUnderflow) if negative)
a.checked_mul(3)   // → Option<Currency> (None on overflow)
```

---

## Error

All SDK errors. Implements `std::error::Error` via `thiserror`.

```rust
use mina_sdk::Error;

match result {
    Err(Error::AccountNotFound(key)) => { /* account doesn't exist */ }
    Err(Error::Graphql { query_name, messages, errors }) => { /* GraphQL-level error */ }
    Err(Error::Connection { query_name, attempts, source }) => { /* network failure */ }
    Err(Error::MissingField { query_name, field }) => { /* unexpected response shape */ }
    Err(Error::InvalidCurrency(input)) => { /* bad currency string */ }
    Err(Error::CurrencyUnderflow(a, b)) => { /* a - b would be negative */ }
    Ok(value) => { /* success */ }
}
```

---

## SyncStatus

```rust
use mina_sdk::SyncStatus;
// Variants: Connecting, Listening, Offline, Bootstrap, Synced, Catchup
// Serializes as SCREAMING_SNAKE_CASE via serde
// Display impl: "SYNCED", "BOOTSTRAP", etc.
```

---

## Response Types

### DaemonStatus
```rust
pub struct DaemonStatus {
    pub sync_status: SyncStatus,
    pub blockchain_length: Option<i64>,
    pub highest_block_length_received: Option<i64>,
    pub uptime_secs: Option<i64>,
    pub state_hash: Option<String>,
    pub commit_id: Option<String>,
    pub peers: Option<Vec<PeerInfo>>,
}
```

### PeerInfo
```rust
pub struct PeerInfo {
    pub peer_id: String,
    pub host: String,
    pub port: i64,
}
```

### AccountData
```rust
pub struct AccountData {
    pub public_key: String,
    pub nonce: u64,
    pub balance: AccountBalance,
    pub delegate: Option<String>,
    pub token_id: Option<String>,
}
```

### AccountBalance
```rust
pub struct AccountBalance {
    pub total: Currency,
    pub liquid: Option<Currency>,
    pub locked: Option<Currency>,
}
```

### BlockInfo
```rust
pub struct BlockInfo {
    pub state_hash: String,
    pub height: u64,
    pub global_slot_since_hard_fork: u64,
    pub global_slot_since_genesis: u64,
    pub creator_pk: String,
    pub command_transaction_count: i64,
}
```

### SendPaymentResult / SendDelegationResult
```rust
pub struct SendPaymentResult {
    pub id: String,
    pub hash: String,
    pub nonce: u64,
}
// SendDelegationResult has the same fields
```

### PooledUserCommand
```rust
pub struct PooledUserCommand {
    pub id: String,
    pub hash: String,
    pub kind: String,
    pub nonce: String,
    pub amount: String,
    pub fee: String,
    pub from: String,
    pub to: String,
}
```

---

## Links

- Repository: https://github.com/MinaProtocol/mina-sdk-rust
- API Docs: https://docs.rs/mina-sdk
- Crates.io: https://crates.io/crates/mina-sdk
- Mina Protocol: https://minaprotocol.com
- Mina Developer Docs: https://docs.minaprotocol.com
- Mina GraphQL Schema: https://docs.minaprotocol.com/node-developers/graphql-api
